description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer. Enhance the resilience of the 4-service application stack at ~/projects/healthcheck-lab/ by adding healthcheck configurations and restart policies to every service in the docker-compose.yml. The stack includes product-catalog (Node.js, port 3000, endpoint /healthz), order-service (Python Flask, port 5000, endpoint /health), db (PostgreSQL), and cache (Redis). Healthchecks must utilize curl for web services, pg_isready for the database, and redis-cli for the cache. Document the healthy status of all services in ~/Desktop/health_status.txt. Login: user ga, password password123.
